name: autonomous-ai-agents
description: Fleet-identity lookup for Jack's autonomous AI agents. Maps intent names (Hermes, Zolivier, KimiClaw) to their Discord/Telegram surfaces (Wings, Zoe, Mara, Kopi) by reading the canonical mapping at ~/Documents/Coordination/ — no duplicated data. v0.1 ships one skill (fleet-identity); v0.2 will add Hermes MCP integration via a separate superplan.
